title: Start Of Summer Shindig: OOFT! ⥊ Ann Tweak ⥊ Hobbes ⥊ Cosmico + more ⥊ Club_Nacht
location: The Bongo Club, 66 Cowgate; Edinburgh, EH1 1JX;  Scotland; United Kingdom
description:
Summer officially starts here. On Saturday 20th June, ahead of the summer solstice, we’re pleased to welcome back our Start Of Summer Shindig, this time with a very special guest: OOFT!.

A true mainstay of Scotland’s underground for well over a decade, OOFT! (aka Ali Herron) has earned his reputation through consistently strong release, DJ sets, and parties rooted in house, disco, funk and Balearic sounds. A DJ first and foremost, his approach is musical unflashy, and forever in the know.... the kind of selector who knows how exactly to let a record breathe.

As a DJ he has held long-running residencies at some of Glasgow's top venues including theThe Sub Club, The Berkeley Suite and, more recently, weekly Sundays at La Cheetah for his KEEP ON residency with fellow Gtown veteran David Barbarossa. Beyond Glasgow, he’s toured extensively across the UK, Europe and further afield, bringing a sound that comfortably moves from slow-motion Balearic moods through underground disco to classic, soulful house.

In the studio, OOFT! has built a deep and varied catalogue, releasing on respected international labels and carving out a reputation for music that DJs actually play. His 2012 track 'Love & Soulsaving' became something of a modern underground classic moving effortlessly through DJ bags worldwide, clocking up close to three and a half million streams and selling out its vinyl run, copies of which now regularly fetch serious money second-hand.

Since the release of his debut album Intricacies Of Modern Life in 2018, the focus has shifted. While original productions continue, much of his studio time is now spent crafting bespoke edits, reworks and tweaks - tools designed purely for the dancefloor. Many are cut exclusively for his own sets, tested in the moment and never released publicly. It’s this behind-the-scenes graft - the quiet refinement of records you didn’t know you needed - that keeps OOFT! firmly in demand and endlessly trusted behind the decks.

⥊

2026 Parties:

Sat 03 Jan ⥊ Club_Nacht Payback Party
Sat 31 Jan ⥊ Étienne de Crécy - WARM UP Album Tour
Sat 28 Feb ⥊ Session Victim (Live)
Sat 28 Mar ⥊ Theo Kottis (Permanent Vacation / Dekmantel)
Sat 24 April ⥊ Michelle Manetti (Femme Fraiche) [HM 13th Anniversary]
Sat 23 May ⥊ Hector's 14th Birthday w/ Special Guest TBA
Sat 20 June ⥊ Start of Summer Shindig w/ OOFT! (La Cheetah)
Sat 18 July ⥊ Bongo Closing Party w/ Special Guest TBA

+ many more to come

title: Lone (Live) Hyperphantasia Tour - Edinburgh
location: Sneaky Pete's, 73 Cowgate; Edinburgh, EH1 1JW; Scotland; United Kingdom
description:
“Hyperphantasia is: Unhinged, unrestrained, self-indulgent bat-shit pop music from an alternate dimension. A beautiful, synthetic hall of mirrors head rush... Like taking every style I've worked with amping them up to 11 and firing them off a cliff”  - Lone 

Enter the kaleidoscopic world of Lone - returning to Greco-Roman for his first album in five years, ‘Hyperphantasia’.

An artist who has been soundtracking dancefloors since the early 2000s, Lone (real name Matt Cutler) made his production debut in 2008 with “Lemurian”, a hip-hop inspired release before moving into the vibrant future-facing soundscapes we have come to know. His back catalogue ranges through house, rave, ambient and electronica, and on ‘Hyperphantasia’, Cutler sets himself the challenge to bring all of those influences together for one body of work that he describes ‘like an album in my mind’. Referring back to the album title, the definition of hyperphantasia is a condition characterized by exceptionally vivid and detailed mental imagery and for this album he tested himself to see how close he could get the music to sound exactly like what he was hearing in his imagination.   

On Hyperphantasia, Lone deepens his relationship with vocals. Having previously relied on vocal samples or more abstract live vocal treatments, this latest album marks a shift toward richer, more pop-leaning sensibilities. Cutler makes a clear lyrical statement, enlisting a diverse and carefully chosen cast of collaborators: London-based artists and fellow Greco-Roman affiliates Ell Murphy and Lou Hayter, Barcelona’s breakthrough singer Bikôkô, cult Nottingham rapper Juga-Naut, and Hong Kong-born, London-based musician Merry Lamb Lamb. Together, they contribute to what stands as a career-defining project.

The end result is a cinematic experience exploding full of colour. You are introduced to the album with an old school rave anthem ‘Life Spark’ and an interlude welcoming you into this musical world. Like chapters in a novel, the album ebbs and flows beautifully between stripped-back melodies ‘Opening A Portal’, ‘Photographs That Don’t Exist’, ‘Sickly, Sweetly, Summer Movie’ and ‘Fruit Rots, Water Floats Downstream’, bubbling feel-good house ‘Affinity (Cloud Four Four Mix)’, ‘Triton’ and ‘ Wemove’, the rap-influenced ‘Throw The Ember’ and epic future-pop tracks ‘Miracle Mile’, ‘Big World’, ‘Scattergun’ and ‘Home’. The album ends with a full circle moment, back to the early hardcore and jungle rave scene, on ‘Ascenscion.png’.

title: People's Disco Club w. Aroop Roy + Toni McVey & Ricardo
location: People's Leisure Club, 45 Lothian Street, Edinburgh, EH1 1HB
description:
People's Disco Club Presents
AROOP ROY (2 hour set)
+ TONI McVEY
+ RICARDO
Friday 5th June
People's Leisure Club
11pm - 3am

Tickets: £8 - 12 + BF via RA

Aroop Roy is a DJ, producer and label head, who joins the dots between electronic music and borderless organic sounds. From house, garage and techno to jazz, disco and global rhythms, his productions have become a mainstay across scenes and generations.  He recently signed to Kerri Chandler’s Kaoz Theory and has forthcoming remixes for Basement Jaxx, Mr Scruff and Marcos Valle amongst many others. 

As a DJ, Aroop’s sets are full of personality and infectious groove, effortlessly blending sounds from across the musical spectrum and consistently bringing magic to the dancefloor. His all night shows and ‘Aroop Roy & Friends’ series have been immensely popular and he has played some classic sets at the likes of We Out Here,  Defected Croatia, Southport Weekender and Glitterbox.

Showcasing his skills as digger and tastemaker, Aroop's label - Vive La Musique - reissues and reworks rare eclectic sounds from around the world. From Caribbean Zouk and Congolese Rumba to French jazz-fusion and South African soul, the catalogue has been celebrated by tastemakers across the globe. 

"Aroop Roy is an incredible DJ, with a warm, soulful, deep and catchy mood that pulls you in and won't let go." Mr Scruff

"One of my favourite DJs on the planet"
Melvo Baptiste (Defected/Glitterbox)

"Brilliant producer and incredible DJ. Aroop is someone who never fails!"
Gilles Peterson (BBC)

Support comes from our resident selector Toni McVey, known for her glittering all vinyl set spacked with classic disco energy - and Richard Perry, curator and resident DJ of the hugely popular Luvin' Leith house and disco parties.

Packed-out summer-soaked session incoming!!

title: TheGetDown#15 - Faro - Rebecca Vasmant - 2Spaces6DJ's
location: Leith Arches, 6 Manderston St, Edinburgh, EH6 8LY
description:
WOW... WE ARE 3!
Yes, it's our 3rd Birthday and we're going BIGGER than ever!
We've curated another absolutely stonking line-up to mark the occasion..
2 Spaces 6 DJs
THE GET DOWN 15 — Our 3rd Birthday
Friday 12th June 5pm - 2am (Subject to License)
Leith Arches
Ticket includes pre party Cafe Vibes 5pm-9pm
FARO
Faro is a London-based DJ & artist known for soulful selections, vibrant energy, and a deep love for music. Since 2014, she's played across the UK & internationally at spots including SunceBeat, Kala Festival, We Out Here, Pikes Ibiza, and Fabric to name a few.
Raised on her dad's R&B & Soul collection, Faro's sound blends House, Broken Beat, Disco, Jazz, Garage & beyond. Alongside DJing, she co-runs packed bi-monthly LEV parties at the iconic BBE Store.
Now diving deeper into production & vocals, with her upcoming EP Destination Mystery landing this summer alongside Pandar, plus new releases with Streeton on the way.
THIS MONTH CATCH HER AT
Brixton Disco Festival • KOKO • Forward Motion Festival • Vittoria Wharf w/ Frits Wentink • Groove Odyssey Go Ibiza
REBECCA VASMANT
Rebecca Vasmant is a key figure in Glasgow's underground music scene - DJ, producer, composer & broadcaster blending spiritual jazz, broken beat, soul, hip-hop, Latin & African grooves.
A longtime resident and curator at Sub Club, with a monthly show on Worldwide FM and regular appearances on BBC Radio Scotland, she's become known for fearless selections and immersive live performances.
Her sold-out debut album With Love, From Glasgow - released on her own label Rebecca's Records - earned support from Gilles Peterson, Mr Scruff, Jamz Supernova & Huey Morgan, cementing her as one of the UK jazz scene's most exciting voices.
Whether behind the decks or leading her live ensemble, Rebecca moves seamlessly from deep electronic cuts to global soul and jazz-fuelled dancefloor energy.
MORE DJs TO FOLLOW
Residents Paul & James will be warming things up and keeping the energy just right.
Expect serious grooves, disco pressure and dancefloor business all night long.
We can't wait to see you on the dancefloor!

title: DRIP Pride
location: People's Leisure Club, 45 Lothian Street, Edinburgh, EH1 1HB
description:
HEY!!
Edinburgh we are here
Fresh off the shelf and ready for consumption, Scotland’s sexiest party hits Edinburgh Pride.

 5AM TBC OTD

Our first time at the People's Leisure Club, and we can’t wait to dance all together on this special night.

LINE UP: 

REENIE

Meet Reenie, London based queer DJ & Non-Binary Hot Girl in Your Area and beyond a fixture of the London queer scene and beyond. Her sets have lit up the stages of London most iconic venues and parties including Unfold, Mala Junta, Howl, and Sextou. As a DJ, host and producer, Reenie has captivated audiences across the UK and internationally, keeping dancefloors sweating and crowds dancing. Reenie has graced the lineups of some of London's most exciting events and has collaborated with major names like Glitterbox, Boiler Room, Peggy Gou, FKA Twigs and even the iconic Coachella festival. Her influence and presence continue to shape and inspire London's vibrant nightlife community.

MIIRA 

miira holds down a residency at Edinburgh community radio station ehtm with their show Warm Up, which strives to represent underrecognised talent in the Scottish scene. They are also known as a member of DJ collective "Miss World".
They have supported names like 4am Kru, Mantra, Eich, Honeydrip and sadsugar amongst others and played at festivals like Kelburn Garden Party and Headset Festival.
mira's eclectic sets are characterised by heavy basslines and percussive rhythms. Their sets traverse the spectrum of dance music, from shuddering 140 to hefty breaks, no set of theirs is the same but is guaranteed to get your feet moving.


3MR 

3MR is a Syrian-born, Scotland-based multidisciplinary artist and DJ whose work reimagines sound as a site of memory, rupture, and release. Their sets bend genres and timelines, remixing sonic textures familiar to many growing up across the global majority, yet re-presented through digital, futuristic transformations. Blurring past and future, intimacy and intensity, 3MR creates spaces of collective resonance and liberation. They are also the co-founder of QIWA and DRIP.

SPINEFLUID 

Lithuanian-born Spinefluid moves intuitively across textures and tempos, blending avant-garde twists, moments of softness, and pure whimsy into an elastic, unpredictable sound. 

Concept: drip team 
Graphic design: @51mbv
Photography: @loumacphotography
Model: @ferris.has_bad.hair



Here is the info for the hotties:

Dance floor: dance, kiss and serve. 
Chill area: talk, pose and chill.  


CAMERAS & PHOTOGRAPHY// DRIP has a strict no-camera policy. Stickers will be placed on all phone cameras at the door to ensure privacy.   

We know the rules of the underground. No cameras. Just the moment. But we have no choice. We film to archive our artists. To document queer sound, queer bodies, queer nights. 

We document queer culture as it happens because no one else will. Our photographer will move quietly, capturing from a distance. No face will be photographed without permission. 
Most photography will take place in the outdoor area. If you do not wish to be approached, ask for a sticker at the door.

>ACCESSIBILITY// Unfortunately, The People's Leisure Club is not wheelchair accessible. If you have mobility needs and would like to attend, please contact us at least 48 hours in advance so we can explore possible accommodations.  

>COMMUNITY TICKETS// We’re committed to keeping DRIP as accessible as possible. If you’re unwaged or low-income, please reach out for community tickets. Priority goes to our BIPOC and trans fam. These tickets are limited and distributed on a first-come, first-serve basis.   

>SAFER SPACE POLICY// We do not tolerate any form of discrimination, harassment, or abusive behaviour. DRIP is a space that celebrates diverse expressions of queerness, gender, and race. Do not assume anyone’s gender, pronouns, sexuality, or background. Consent is mandatory, always.   

>ENTRY// This event is 18+. ID is required and bags will be checked at the door. Holding a ticket does not guarantee entry we reserve the right to refuse entry to protect the safety and vibe of the space. 


See you in the dance floor x

title: Leithienda - Grooverider - Exclusive Hacienda / Summer Of Love Set
location: Leith Arches, 6 Manderston St, Edinburgh, EH6 8LY
description:
Leithienda Presents 

THE RAVE NEVER STOPPED #1

GROOVERIDER - Exclusive Hacienda / Summer Of Love Set

It gives us immense pleasure to welcome the legendary Grooverider to Leithienda for a very special set celebrating the music, culture, and energy of the Hacienda and the Summer of Love—the era that started it all. 

Before the big clubs, before the mainstream, there were warehouses, fields, underground parties, Acid House, Balearic Beats, dancefloors full of freedom, smiles and hands in the air. This exclusive set is about that feeling. 

Expect a journey through classic house, acid house and early rave sounds — the music that built the scene we all love today. 

A true pioneer. A true moment for Leithienda.

Music First. Always.

title: UpOnARoof Alfresco All-dayer Victor Simonelli + Iain Boney Clark
location: Skyline Sips, St James Quarter Rooftop, Level 5, St James Quarter, Edinburgh EH1 3AD
description:
WELCOME TO... UpOnARoof 3.0 @ SKYLINE SIPS

PRE REGISTER NOW

Tickets go live Sunday 10th May at 2pm.

Join us on Level 5 of St James Quarter for a semi-alfresco rooftop escape, boasting breathtaking views over Edinburgh's iconic Calton Hill.

After two completely sold-out events in 2025, UpOnARoof returns — bigger, better, and bringing another phenomenal lineup to the city.

This edition, we're proud to welcome back a true legend...

VICTOR SIMONELLI - HERITAGE NEW YORK STYLE SET

A global force in house music, Victor Simonelli is one of the original pioneers of the New York underground scene. Known for his relentless touring schedule and timeless sound, Victor continues to shape dance floors worldwide with both classic cuts and fresh productions.

From his early work with Sub-Urban Records, alongside Tommy Musto under the iconic TMVS moniker, to producing classics like "Don't Be Shy" and Federal Hill's "I Have Something For You", Victor has built a legacy that spans decades.

He later launched influential labels including Bassline, Big Big Trax, and more recently Stellar and West Side, showcasing both his own productions and emerging talent.

An unmatched musical résumé
Victor's production, mixing, and editing credits read like a "who's who" of music history. He has worked with legendary artists including:
David Bowie, Michael Jackson, James Brown, Quincy Jones, Talking Heads, Deborah Harry, and many more.

In the world of dance music, he's collaborated with icons such as Jocelyn Brown, Robert Owens, Martha Wash, and Gwen Guthrie — helping define the sound of a generation.

A mentor and innovator
Victor has also played a key role in nurturing new talent, notably mentoring Sandy Rivera (Kings of Tomorrow), further cementing his influence on the evolution of house music.

WITH SUPPORT FROM:

West Coast Streetrave / AFROBOOGIE legend Iain "Boney" Clark, bringing decades of experience and going a little different digging into his more soulful eclectic side.

Plus a strong lineup of local talent:
James Combe
Dave Fergusson
Jean Lawrie
Dave Elders

Expect:
• Authentic NYC house, disco & everything in-between
• A stunning rooftop setting
• An electric crowd and atmosphere
• Another unforgettable UpOnARoof experience

This is more than just a party — it's a celebration of house music heritage, past, present, and future.

FOOD AVAILABLE TO ORDER TO TABLE ON THE DAY

title: Shadowplay July 2026 - 10th birthday special
location: Devils Cut, 7 - 11 Hope Street, Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom
description:
DJ Vilkas presents

Shadowplay 3 July 2024, 9pm-1am

10th birthday party!

In July 2016, DJ Vilkas co-launched an event in Edinburgh focused on classic sounds of goths with a focus on newer bands innovating this area. Growing from venue to venue, with a brief pause over lockdown where livestreaming became the norm, 2026 marks Shadowplay's 10th birthday! Now focused mostly on newer bands and styles, with a nod to the trailblazers, the club looks towards coldwave, deathrock and synthpunk - anything that promotes that dark punk spirit.
No Spotify playlists, no costume competitions, just real DJs playing great tunes.

For this event, we descend upon Devil's Cut, the exclusive speakeasy underneath Angel's Share hotel, for a special night celebrating this gothic legacy. Stay tuned for some surprises!


Check out previous sets at shadowplayedinburgh.co.uk to see what kind of night it is – including what was played at events over the last 10 years.  I highly recommend pre-buying and getting down early for a great night of music!
Tickets through ra.co - limited run of discount tickets for those who remember our first venue...

Shadowplay Edinburgh is one of the Scottish capital’s freshest and most innovative night playing the classic sounds of goth; post-punk, synthpunk, deathrock, dark wave, touching both classics and touching on more contemporary bands and styles. With a DIY ethic and a passion for dark alternative music, Shadowplay is growing and becoming an integral part of the UK goth scene.

Poster photography by @deadpan.photos

title: Leithienda - Dave Angel - Techno Special
location: Leith Arches, 6 Manderston St, Edinburgh, EH6 8LY
description:
THE RAVE NEVER STOPPED #2

DAVE ANGEL

From the Acid House explosion of the late 80s to dominating dancefloors worldwide, Dave Angel has been at the forefront of the sound, blending Detroit influence with raw UK energy.

A DJ who’s played historic Scottish events like Technodrome and Pure, now lands in Leith, his first time playing in the Scottish capital for many years. We are extremely proud to welcome back this legendary DJ to Edinburgh.

A true pioneer of UK Techno and Rave culture.

In support, we have Edinburgh’s finest purveyor of Techno, Stephen Brown.

title: NO FATE - Synthwave/EB(S)M/Cyberpunk
location: People's Leisure Club, 45 Lothian Street, Edinburgh, EH1 1HB
description:
A night of neon synth sounds; a bleak look at the future through the lense of the past – coloured by the 1980s vision of a post-apocalyptic dystopia where we almost find ourselves today. The Yamaha-drenched sounds of recent years, with the Cubase-influenced heavy beats of today will provide the soundtrack, while DJ Vilkas (Shadowplay, Fimbulvetr, AbSynth) & special guest PUCK (Idlestates) entertain with images from prophetic visions of the future.

Ethan Anderson, AKA Puck, is the founder and creative force behind Idlestates Recordings, an imprint rooted in Scotland, UK.
Emerging in the early 2020s, he developed Idlestates as a platform for experimental electronic music driven by a punk leaning ethos—bringing together the raw edges of electro, EBM and industrial. This identity runs through the label's releases, his DJ sets, and an evolving archive of radio broadcasts.
As both contributor and curator across the labels releases, he has connected a diverse group of rising and established artists, united by a commitment to raw, boundary pushing sound. His vision continues to steer Idlestates as it broadens its catalogue and global community, reinforcing the label’s reputation as a home for forward thinking electronic innovation.

DJ Vilkas co-founded Shadowplay Edinburgh in 2016, playing the new sounds of goth, coldwave, postpunk and deathrock in the capital. This industrial-themed spinoff, NO FATE, is now in its seventh annual incarnation. Usually reserved for Twitch and YouTube-based livestreaming, 2026 marks the third real life excursion.

An evening of music, film and appreciation of a particular scene in a particular time. Join us for the soundtrack to the apocalypse, as 1982 imagined in 2026. Check out the website for past sets and what you might expect this time.

Friday 31 July 2026
People's Leisure Club, Lothian Street, Bristo Square, Edinburgh
tickets via ra.co
Right Of Entry Reserved - this isn't a fancy dress contest, but please respect the theme of the event and dress darkly - all black minimum or some kind of cyber/goth themed attire will be expected at the door.

title: Maribou State
location: TBA - Fringe by the Sea Big Top , null
description:
UK electronic duo Maribou State bring their soulful, genre-blurring sound with their stunning, immersive live show. 

Chris Davids and Liam Ivory have spent over a decade crafting a warm, organic style that blends laidback electronica with touches of soul, UK club music and rich atmospheric sounds.

Since emerging in 2011, Maribou State have become one of the most exciting names on the global dance scene. From their breakthrough album Portraits to the acclaimed Kingdoms in Colour, and their recent album Hallucinating Love, their music balances evocative samples with emotional depth, creating tracks that feel equally at home on the dancefloor or on a festival field.

Known for their immersive live performances, the duo have played everywhere from Glastonbury to the Sydney Opera House, selling out tours across the UK, Europe and North America. Their live shows combine live instrumentation, soaring vocals and deep, groove-led electronics to create an unforgettable atmosphere.

Expect smooth grooves, expansive beats and a feel-good energy as we welcome Maribou State to Fringe by the Sea.

Support act to be announced.
Under 18s are welcome. Under 16s must be accompanied by an over 18.

title: Pulse: Surgeon
location: The Bongo Club, 66 Cowgate; Edinburgh, EH1 1JX;  Scotland; United Kingdom
description:
Surgeon has been at the forefront of UK techno since 1994.
His debut EP is regarded by many as seminal, launching his career along with several early Downwards releases, causing a ripple of excitement through the techno cognoscenti of the time. Surgeon has been prolific since, with three albums on Tresor and numerous Counterbalance and Dynamic Tension EPs as well as his 'Breaking The Frame’, ‘From Farthest Known Objects’ and ‘Luminosity Device’ LPs “Over the course of his career, the Birmingham resident has perfected a unique and uncommonly effective production style. His is a tough techno sound with an industrial murk about it but also plenty of funk, swing and a sophisticated sense of dub-space learned in part from his Chain Reaction contemporaries in Berlin. Proving that hard can also be smart, sensuous and danceable, the influence of Surgeon on the 2010-ruling Ostgut/Berghain sound – DJs/producers like Marcel Dettmann, Shed et al – is substantial”. (Fact Magazine)

title: Feel The Real: Rap Saunders, Frederick
location: People's Leisure Club, 45 Lothian Street, Edinburgh, EH1 1HB
description:
We’re bringing that Soulmates vibe to Edinburgh—deep, soulful, and built for real house music lovers—known for their welcoming crowd, spiritual energy and deep house foundations—since 2002 this legendary London night has been providing music inspiration, no compromise.

Joining Feel The Real resident, Frederick is Rap Saunders, a true selector and cornerstone of the UK house scene. With decades behind the decks, his sets are a journey—rooted in soul, shaped by the underground, and driven by pure feeling. Expect depth, groove and moments that lock the room in from start to finish.
